title: Production Agent Loop and Goal Capstone · State Clinic: Operations Defense
summary: Build a safe goal-driven agent for a realistic repository or operations task. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops operations defense increment in a production-ready agent-loop reference implementation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Defend architecture, limitations, cost, monitoring, and operator procedures.
Gate release on scenario, trajectory, security, and recovery evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Operations Defense evidence
